prompt: Create a realistic documentary-style outdoor photograph of a partially open silver laptop resting on a rough concrete curb beside dense wild grass. The laptop is open only a few inches like a shelter, with a dark shadowed gap between the lid and base, and a small cute smiling flower sticker centered on the top lid. Show exactly 6 small green tree frogs: 4 frogs perched on the upper lid, including one near the left edge facing left, one near the back center facing left, one near the right-center facing left, and one on the far right edge facing left; 2 frogs on or under the lower half, including one crouched in the dark gap near the left side and one sitting on the front lower edge near the center facing right. Surround the scene with tall tangled green weeds, thin stems, and small white daisy-like wildflowers, with a dry brown leaf on the right and a dark vertical object barely visible at the far left edge. Use muted natural colors, overcast soft light, shallow depth of field, realistic textures on the mossy stained curb, and a slightly eerie “many tiny animals gathered around an abandoned object” mood. Horizontal 16:9 composition, low eye-level angle, no people, no added text, no watermark.
